I find ultra the easiest to understand
sometimes you take the cards out

first card played each turn gets put into the bar above your characters, when the bar is full hitting end turn gives you those cards and an extra turn dubbed the ultra turn, if you press the left side of the ultra bar you can trade one card in the bar, slowing how fast you get the turn, in exchange for one insight (1 arith and 1 card draw on play)

Some awakeners have Leap and Quasar effects, basically when their card goes into the bar you get extra effects, Leaps will give you the extra effect within the Ultra Turn while Quasars just have a cost reduction in ultra turn
